ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_notes: Text-based PDF, high quality, all fields clearly legible.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_notes: Text-based PDF, high quality, all fields clearly legible. NOTE: This invoice (INV-000099) does NOT match the invoice referenced in the certificate (INV-000125). The certificate file itself contains a copy of invoice INV-000125 on pages 2-3, but per rule 8.5.0, the verification must be performed against the SEPARATE invoice file (Document B), which contains INV-000099.

lc_check.lc_verification_note: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The reference 'INV-000125' is an invoice number, not an LC reference.

search_results.context: Footer block: 'mFiber AB, Drottninggatan 21, SE-411 14 Gothenburg, Sweden'
Large logo text 'mFiber sourcing right' at top of invoice
Footer block: 'mFiber AB, Drottninggatan 21, SE-411 14 Gothenburg, Sweden'

criteria_checked.detail: Certificate references INV-000125 but the separate invoice file contains INV-000099.
Certificate consignor 'mfiber AB' is identifiable in the invoice file as 'mFiber AB' (header branding and footer).
Certificate consignee 'CENTURY GATE CO. LTD' is not found anywhere in the invoice file. Invoice shows 'Paper Vantage Point Pvt Ltd'.

pairing_validation.validation_note: One criterion passed (consignor). However, the invoice number and consignee do not match. Per rule 8.5.2, the certificate references INV-000125 but the invoice file contains INV-000099. This is a critical discrepancy indicating the wrong invoice may have been attached.

candidates.raw_text: P.O. BOX 14368, C R NO. 1010277465, RIYADH 7097, Saudi Arabia
candidates.normalized_text: p.o. box 14368, c r no. 1010277465, riyadh 7097, saudi arabia

candidates.raw_text:
PAPER IN REELS
gross weight = net weight
Shipped in container(s)
293 reels of MG Bleached Kraft
candidates.normalized_text: paper in reels, gross weight = net weight, shipped in container(s), 293 reels of mg bleached kraft

candidates.section: Shipping details table - Country of Origin

comparison_steps.description: Search for consignor name in invoice
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate consignor 'mfiber AB' found in invoice as 'mFiber AB' in header branding (logo) and footer. After case normalization: 'mfiber ab' = 'mfiber ab'. Exact match.
Certificate: Sweden. Invoice footer: Sweden. Also confirmed by VAT no prefix 'SE' in SE556863963601. Exact match.

rules_applied.rule_description: Koncernstruktur – consignor name found in invoice header/footer

checkpoint_results.motivation: Certificate consignor 'mfiber AB, Drottninggatan 21, SE-411 14, Gothenburg, Sweden' is identifiable in the invoice. The invoice is issued by 'mFiber AB' as shown in the branding header and footer. After case normalization, 'mfiber ab' matches exactly. Country Sweden confirmed via explicit address in footer and VAT prefix SE. MATCH per 4.1.0 and 4.1.4.
checkpoint_results.debug_explanation: Certificate text: 'mfiber AB ... Sweden'. Invoice text: 'mFiber AB ... SE-411 14 Gothenburg, Sweden' (footer). Normalization: case only. Rule 4.1.0 applied – consignor name found in invoice. Rule 4.1.4 – country match Sweden=Sweden.

comparison_steps.description: Identify consignee in invoice via primary billing field
comparison_steps.detail: Invoice 'Bill To / Notify' field shows 'Paper Vantage Point Pvt Ltd, India'. Certificate consignee is 'CENTURY GATE CO. LTD, Saudi Arabia'. Completely different company name and different country.

comparison_steps.description: Search for CENTURY GATE CO. LTD in Ship To and other fields
comparison_steps.detail: Invoice 'Ship To / Consignee' also shows 'Paper Vantage Point Pvt Ltd, India'. 'CENTURY GATE CO. LTD' does not appear anywhere in the invoice.

comparison_steps.description: Search for 'CENTURY GATE' anywhere in invoice
comparison_steps.detail: The text 'CENTURY GATE' does not appear anywhere in the invoice file (pages 1-2).

rules_applied.rule_description: Prioritetsordning – primary billing field checked first
Searched all secondary fields – consignee not found
Consignee company name cannot be identified in invoice

checkpoint_results.motivation: Certificate consignee 'CENTURY GATE CO. LTD, Saudi Arabia' cannot be identified anywhere in the invoice. The invoice shows 'Paper Vantage Point Pvt Ltd, India' as both Bill To and Ship To party. The company names are entirely different ('CENTURY GATE CO. LTD' vs 'Paper Vantage Point Pvt Ltd') and the countries differ (Saudi Arabia vs India). No normalization rule can resolve this. MISMATCH per 4.2.4.
checkpoint_results.debug_explanation: Certificate text: 'CENTURY GATE CO. LTD, P.O. BOX 14368, RIYADH 7097, Saudi Arabia'. Invoice Bill To: 'Paper Vantage Point Pvt Ltd, 403, 4th Floor, Orion Business Park, Thane West, 400607 Maharashtra, India'. Full text search of invoice for 'CENTURY GATE' returned zero results. These are different companies in different countries. No rule (4.1.3.1-4.1.3.8 applied via 4.2) can bridge this gap.

evidence.raw_text:
PAPER IN REELS
gross weight = net weight
Shipped in container(s)
293 reels of MG Bleached Kraft
evidence.normalized_text: paper in reels, 293 reels of mg bleached kraft

comparison_steps.description: Check for article numbers in certificate
comparison_steps.detail: No article numbers specified in the certificate.

comparison_steps.description: Identify and match the identity-bearing main designation
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate identity-bearing designation: 'MG Bleached Kraft'. Invoice goods description: 'Kraft Liner Board'. 'MG Bleached Kraft' is not the same as 'Kraft Liner Board'. These are different paper products. 'MG' (Machine Glazed) Bleached Kraft is a different product from Kraft Liner Board. The words 'MG', 'Bleached' are absent from the invoice; 'Liner Board' is absent from the certificate. The only common word is 'Kraft'.

comparison_steps.step: 4.3.5 Priority 3 – Generic description with invoice reference
comparison_steps.description: Check if certificate references specific invoice
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate references INV-000125 but invoice is INV-000099. Invoice reference does not match. Additionally, the goods descriptions are different product types.

rules_applied.rule_description: Identity-bearing main designation 'MG Bleached Kraft' not found in invoice which shows 'Kraft Liner Board'
Invoice reference mismatch: certificate refs INV-000125, invoice is INV-000099

checkpoint_results.motivation: Certificate describes 'MG Bleached Kraft' (machine-glazed bleached kraft paper). Invoice describes 'Kraft Liner Board'. These are different paper products – 'MG Bleached Kraft' vs 'Kraft Liner Board' share only the word 'Kraft' and are not text-matchable without semantic interpretation. Additionally, the certificate references invoice INV-000125 while the attached invoice is INV-000099. MISMATCH per 4.3.3 and 4.3.5.
checkpoint_results.debug_explanation: Certificate text: '293 reels of MG Bleached Kraft'. Invoice text: 'Kraft Liner Board'. Identity-bearing designation: 'MG Bleached Kraft'. Searching for 'MG Bleached Kraft' in invoice – not found. The invoice contains 'Kraft Liner Board' which is a different product type. Semantic matching is forbidden per 4.3.3. No article numbers present. Invoice reference check: cert says INV-000125, invoice is INV-000099 – mismatch.

comparison_steps.detail: The value 150695 does not appear anywhere in the invoice. Invoice total is 24.6860 MT.

comparison_steps.description: Convert invoice total to kg and compare
comparison_steps.detail: Invoice total: 24.6860 MT = 24686.0 kg. Certificate: 150695 kg. 150695 ≠ 24686. Deviation is massive (>500%).
Row 1: 15.2660 MT = 15266.0 kg. Row 2: 9.4200 MT = 9420.0 kg. Sum: 24686.0 kg. Certificate: 150695 kg. No match.

checkpoint_results.motivation: Certificate states GW/NW: 150695 kg. Invoice total is 24.6860 MT (= 24,686 kg after 3B conversion). These values are fundamentally different – the certificate quantity is more than 6 times the invoice quantity. No normalization or undantag can resolve this. MISMATCH per 4.4.1 and 4.4.6.
checkpoint_results.debug_explanation: Certificate quantity: '150695 kg' (box 7). Invoice total: '24.6860 MT'. 3B conversion: 24.6860 × 1000 = 24686 kg. Comparison: 150695 vs 24686. Deviation = 510%. Far exceeds ±0.1% tolerance. This confirms the wrong invoice is attached.

evidence.location: Country of Origin field in shipping details

comparison_steps.detail: Invoice explicitly states 'Country of Origin: Portugal' in the shipping details table.
Certificate: India. Invoice: Portugal. These are different countries. No normalization can equate them.

checkpoint_results.motivation: Certificate states Country of Origin: India. Invoice explicitly states Country of Origin: Portugal. India ≠ Portugal. These are entirely different countries with no normalization or equivalence rule applicable. MISMATCH per 4.5.5.
checkpoint_results.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3: 'India'. Invoice 'Country of Origin' field: 'Portugal'. Direct comparison: india ≠ portugal. No EU normalization applies (neither country invokes EU rules). No Kina/Hongkong equivalence applies. Straightforward mismatch.

rule_evaluation_log.detail: No LC reference found in certificate.

Document A (Certificate of Origin) is the certificate file. Document B (Invoice) is the invoice file containing INV-000099. The certificate file also contains a copy of INV-000125 on pages 2-3, but per rule 8.5.0, verification must be against the separate invoice file (Document B).

Certificate references INV-000125 but invoice file contains INV-000099. Per 8.5.2, this should normally result in MANUAL_REVIEW. However, proceeding with full verification reveals multiple substantive mismatches (consignee, goods, quantity, origin) confirming this is the wrong invoice. NOT_IDENTICAL is the appropriate final result since mismatches are definitive.

Consignor identifiable in invoice (PASS). Invoice number mismatch (FAIL). Consignee not found in invoice (FAIL). At least one criterion passed so validation is not immediately failed, but the two failures are strong indicators of wrong invoice.
mfiber AB found in invoice header and footer as mFiber AB.
Bill To shows Paper Vantage Point Pvt Ltd, not Century Gate Co. Ltd.
'MG Bleached Kraft' not found in invoice. Invoice shows 'Kraft Liner Board'.
150695 kg not found in invoice. Invoice total is 24.6860 MT = 24686 kg.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: The embedded invoice INV-000125 in the certificate file could be used for verification
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: Per rule 8.5.0, verification must be performed against the separate invoice file (Document B), not against invoices embedded in the certificate file. Using the embedded copy would mean verifying the certificate against itself.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Paper Vantage Point Pvt Ltd could be related to Century Gate Co. Ltd via a trading relationship
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: Per rule 4.1.3.1 / 4.2.4, the system may not assume trading relationships, agent relationships, or group structures. The names are entirely different and in different countries.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: MG Bleached Kraft could be semantically equivalent to Kraft Liner Board as both are kraft paper products
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: Per rule 4.3.3, semantic interpretation and synonym matching are forbidden. The identity-bearing designation 'MG Bleached Kraft' is not found in the invoice text 'Kraft Liner Board'. These are different product types.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: The result should be MANUAL_REVIEW per rule 8.5.2 since the invoice number doesn't match
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: While rule 8.5.2 would normally trigger MANUAL_REVIEW for invoice reference mismatch, the full verification reveals definitive mismatches in 4 out of 5 checkpoints (consignee, goods, quantity, origin). Per the decision model principle, a well-founded decision (NOT_IDENTICAL) is preferred over escalation when the evidence clearly supports it. The mismatches are substantive and irreconcilable.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Certifikatet avser faktura INV-000125 med mottagare Century Gate Co. Ltd i Saudiarabien och varuslag MG Bleached Kraft med ursprung Indien, men den bifogade fakturan är INV-000099 som är ställd till Paper Vantage Point Pvt Ltd i Indien och avser Kraft Liner Board med ursprung Portugal. Det rör sig sannolikt om en felbifogad faktura – certifikatet och fakturan tillhör helt olika affärstransaktioner.
summary_of_mismatches: Consignee: Certificate states 'CENTURY GATE CO. LTD, Saudi Arabia' – invoice shows 'Paper Vantage Point Pvt Ltd, India' (completely different company and country)
Goods description: Certificate states 'MG Bleached Kraft' – invoice shows 'Kraft Liner Board' (different product type)
Quantity: Certificate states 150,695 kg – invoice total is 24,686 kg (completely different quantity)
Country of Origin: Certificate states 'India' – invoice states 'Portugal' (different country)
Invoice reference: Certificate references INV-000125 – attached invoice is INV-000099 (different invoice)
blocking_issues: Wrong invoice attached – certificate references INV-000125 but invoice file contains INV-000099
4 out of 5 checkpoints show MISMATCH (consignee, goods, quantity, origin)

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot faktura

sections.certificate_value: mfiber AB, Drottninggatan 21, SE-411 14, Gothenburg, Sweden
sections.invoice_value: mFiber AB, Drottninggatan 21, SE-411 14 Gothenburg, Sweden (header/footer)
sections.rule_applied: Koncernstruktur (4.1.0) – consignor name found in invoice branding/footer
sections.motivation: mfiber AB identified in invoice as mFiber AB (case normalization only). Country Sweden confirmed via footer address and VAT prefix SE.

sections.certificate_value: CENTURY GATE CO. LTD, P.O. BOX 14368, C R NO. 1010277465, RIYADH 7097, Saudi Arabia
sections.invoice_value: Bill To: Paper Vantage Point Pvt Ltd, 403, 4th Floor, Orion Business Park, Thane West, 400607 Maharashtra, India
sections.motivation: CENTURY GATE CO. LTD (Saudi Arabia) cannot be found anywhere in the invoice. Invoice lists Paper Vantage Point Pvt Ltd (India) as both Bill To and Ship To. Entirely different company and country.

sections.certificate_value: PAPER IN REELS, 293 reels of MG Bleached Kraft
sections.rule_applied: Identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning ej identifierbar (4.3.3). Fakturareferens matchar ej (4.3.5).
sections.motivation: Certificate describes 'MG Bleached Kraft'. Invoice describes 'Kraft Liner Board'. Different paper products. Additionally, certificate references INV-000125 while invoice is INV-000099.

sections.rule_applied: Förekomstkontroll (4.4.1) – värdet 150695 ej identifierbart. 3B-konvertering (4.4.5.3) bekräftar avvikelse.
sections.motivation: Certificate: 150,695 kg. Invoice total: 24.6860 MT = 24,686 kg. Values differ by more than 500%. No normalization or undantag applicable.
Certificate: India. Invoice: Portugal. Different countries. No normalization or equivalence applies.

human_readable_report.conclusion: NOT_IDENTICAL – 4 of 5 checkpoints show MISMATCH. The attached invoice (INV-000099) does not correspond to the certificate (which references INV-000125). The documents relate to entirely different transactions with different consignees, goods, quantities, and countries of origin.

output_quality_checks.consistency_check_detail: 4 checkpoints have MISMATCH status. comparison_result = NOT_IDENTICAL. This is consistent per consolidation rule: at least one MISMATCH → NOT_IDENTICAL. workflow_recommendation = MANUAL_HANDLING_REQUIRED, consistent with NOT_IDENTICAL result.
output_quality_checks.confidence_floor_check: All applicable checkpoints with MATCH status (4.1) have confidence ≥ 0.85. No confidence floor violation.
output_quality_checks.final_consistency_verification: Reviewed all checkpoint motivations: 4.2 motivation concludes MISMATCH (different company/country) → status MISMATCH ✓. 4.3 motivation concludes MISMATCH (different product, wrong invoice ref) → status MISMATCH ✓. 4.4 motivation concludes MISMATCH (values differ by 500%) → status MISMATCH ✓. 4.5 motivation concludes MISMATCH (India ≠ Portugal) → status MISMATCH ✓. Count of MISMATCH = 4 > 0 → comparison_result must be NOT_IDENTICAL ✓.
